author: m.kalinin
content:
i guess this version of nimbus have FCR enabled: https://github.com/status-im/nimbus-eth2/releases#release-v26.6.0
there is no feature flag in Nimbus

author: barnabasbusa
content: any flags? or default enabled?

author: boma_naps
content: Yes this --fast-confirmation-rule

author: barnabasbusa
content: yup found it already

author: barnabasbusa
content:
```yaml
participants_matrix:
  el:
    - el_type: geth

  cl:
    - cl_type: lodestar
      cl_extra_params:
        - --chain.fastConfirmation=true
    - cl_type: nimbus
    - cl_type: grandine
      cl_image: ethpandaops/grandine:bomanaps-feature-fcr-minimal
      cl_extra_params:
        - --fast-confirmation-rule
    - cl_type: prysm
  count: 2
global_log_level: debug
network_params:
  preset: minimal

additional_services:
  - dora
dora_params: 
  image: ethpandaops/dora:bbusa-fcr
```

author: barnabasbusa
content: seems like its working nice, also tried some non finality
